question: Write code to create a database schema for an online bicycle shop that sells bicycles as well as their spare parts and accessories. Use SQAlchemy library to communicate with the database. The code should cover opening and closing of a new connection to the database, creation of necessary tables and their relations, common operations on items in the tables such as addition, deletion, updates, filtered selection and search.

from sqlalchemy import create_engine, Column, Integer, String, Float, ForeignKey
from sqlalchemy.ext.declarative import declarative_base
from sqlalchemy.orm import sessionmaker, relationship

engine = create_engine('sqlite:///bicycle_shop.db')
Base = declarative_base()

class Bicycle(Base):
    __tablename__ = 'bicycles'
    id = Column(Integer, primary_key=True)
    name = Column(String)
    price = Column(Float)
    description = Column(String)
    spare_parts = relationship('SparePart', backref='bicycle')
    accessories = relationship('Accessory', backref='bicycle')

class SparePart(Base):
    __tablename__ = 'spare_parts'
    id = Column(Integer, primary_key=True)
    name = Column(String)
    price = Column(Float)
    description = Column(String)
    bicycle_id = Column(Integer, ForeignKey('bicycles.id'))

class Accessory(Base):
    __tablename__ = 'accessories'
    id = Column(Integer, primary_key=True)
    name = Column(String)
    price = Column(Float)
    description = Column(String)
    bicycle_id = Column(Integer, ForeignKey('bicycles.id'))

Base.metadata.create_all(engine)

Session = sessionmaker(bind=engine)
session = Session()

def add_bicycle(name, price, description):
    bicycle = Bicycle(name=name, price=price, description=description)
    session.add(bicycle)
    session.commit()

def add_spare_part(name, price, description, bicycle_id):
    spare_part = SparePart(name=name, price=price, description=description, bicycle_id=bicycle_id)
    session.add(spare_part)
    session.commit()

def add_accessory(name, price, description, bicycle_id):
    accessory = Accessory(name=name, price=price, description=description, bicycle_id=bicycle_id)
    session.add(accessory)
    session.commit()

def delete_bicycle(id):
    bicycle = session.query(Bicycle).filter_by(id=id).first()
    session.delete(bicycle)
    session.commit()

def delete_spare_part(id):
    spare_part = session.query(SparePart).filter_by(id=id).first()
    session.delete(spare_part)
    session.commit()

def delete_accessory(id):
    accessory = session.query(Accessory).filter_by(id=id).first()
    session.delete(accessory)
    session.commit()

def update_bicycle(id, name, price, description):
    bicycle = session.query(Bicycle).filter_by(id=id).first()
    bicycle.name = name
    bicycle.price = price
    bicycle.description = description
    session.commit()

def update_spare_part(id, name, price, description):
    spare_part = session.query(SparePart).filter_by(id=id).first()
    spare_part.name = name
    spare_part.price = price
    spare_part.description = description
    session.commit()

def update_accessory(id, name, price, description):
    accessory = session.query(Accessory).filter_by(id=id).first()
    accessory.name = name
    accessory.price = price
    accessory.description = description
    session.commit()

def get_bicycles():
    return session.query(Bicycle).all()

def get_spare_parts(bicycle_id):
    return session.query(SparePart).filter_by(bicycle_id=bicycle_id).all()

def get_accessories(bicycle_id):
    return session.query(Accessory).filter_by(bicycle_id=bicycle_id).all()

def get_bicycle(id):
    return session.query(Bicycle).filter_by(id=id).first()

def get_spare_part(id):
    return session.query(SparePart).filter_by(id=id).first()

def get_accessory(id):
    return session.query(Accessory).filter_by(id=id).first()

def close_session():
    session.close()

from sqlalchemy import create_engine, Column, Integer, String, Float, DateTime, ForeignKey, Table
from sqlalchemy.ext.declarative import declarative_base
from sqlalchemy.orm import sessionmaker, relationship
from datetime import datetime

engine = create_engine('sqlite:///online_bicycle_shop.db')
Session = sessionmaker(bind=engine)
session = Session()

Base = declarative_base()

order_items = Table('order_items', Base.metadata,
    Column('order_id', Integer, ForeignKey('orders.id')),
    Column('item_id', Integer, ForeignKey('items.id'))
)

class Category(Base):
    __tablename__ = 'categories'
    id = Column(Integer, primary_key=True)
    name = Column(String)
    items = relationship("Item", backref="category")

class Item(Base):
    __tablename__ = 'items'
    id = Column(Integer, primary_key=True)
    name = Column(String)
    description = Column(String)
    price = Column(Float)
    category_id = Column(Integer, ForeignKey('categories.id'))
    orders = relationship("Order", secondary=order_items, backref="items")
